dialog.npc.banker.name: 凯若琳
不要期望我会为了你的农场借出任何钱。
我已经为了这个村子做了很多事了。
对不起，我不借钱给农民的。
才一个淡季，他们就过来跟你为利息喊苦。
这么多人指望着你，我希望你没有偷懒。
发展中的村子真的很无聊。
毫无文化，就只有一堆苦力跟污秽。
dialog.npc.banker.chatter_friendship0.10: 别浪费我的时间，我的时间比你的值钱多了。
dialog.npc.banker.chatter_friendship0.11: 你现在是在浪费我俩的时间。
dialog.npc.banker.chatter_friendship0.12: 就算没有你打断我，我也完全有能力把自己安排得非常忙碌。
dialog.npc.banker.chatter_friendship0.13: 打断别人工作是很没礼貌的。
其实我不会预设你这样头脑简单的农民会有礼貌。
dialog.npc.banker.chatter_friendship0.14: 别告诉我你过来之前没给自己洗个澡...
我猜住这个地方也不算最差。
你为什么一定要闲聊啊。
我希望你要清楚，我是很忙的。
我看起来是那种你可以每天都来烦的人吗？
你知道吗，其实市场上有更好闻的肥料的。
dialog.npc.banker.chatter_friendship1.10: 我想我已经跟你聊够了。
dialog.npc.banker.chatter_friendship1.12: 最让人讨厌的是那种连自己不受欢迎都看不出的人。
dialog.npc.banker.chatter_friendship1.17: 保持专业，当然前提是你有这个能力的话。
dialog.npc.banker.chatter_friendship1.18: 你不是一个很好的聆听者。
dialog.npc.banker.chatter_friendship1.19: 你是这里唯一一个不听我讲话的人。
这里有好多天然资源可以榨干。
试试多样化你的收入来源。
我不想这个镇子的运作建立在单点风险之上。
是什么让你一直跟我讲话。
我能从山谷的另一头认出这个气味。
那样，他们就能不止一次的听见我想让他们听到的话。
你是那个买光动物饲料的人吗？
这个季度我已经补了两次货了。
你现在的收入没达到应有水平啊。 （这个我超译了，实在想不出怎么翻译）
请别再躺平了，再努力点。
一个意志脆弱的人现在已经放弃跟我讲话了。
你是想要让我帮忙还是你单纯想浪费我时间。
你最近的某些购买记录。。。
dialog.npc.banker.chatter_friendship2.10: 我见过太多这样的小村子一次又一次的失败。
别往失败名单上再加一个。
dialog.npc.banker.chatter_friendship2.12: 你有没有想过为什么商店老板可以神奇的有全部你需要的东西？
你看起来是那种对这种事情毫无知觉的人。
在这里发生的每一件事都是因为我允许它发生。你给我记住了。
我知道你想干嘛，别再偷懒了。
我还是不习惯自然的声音。
我建议你不要挑战这个底线。
我知道曾经有个人经常尝试欺诈阳光谷医院。。。
这个人是个坏人，一块钱都不要借给这个人。
你现在是让我没法做正事，整快点。
我要提醒你，我的时间比你的值钱多了。
我讨厌这里全部的昆虫，真的没人做点什么吗。
我不喜欢一切你为了靠近我而做的尝试。
等我做好这里的事情后，我找个代理人在这，然后去做更好的事情。
你是不是觉得每天跟我讲话，再给我送敷衍的礼物会让我喜欢你？
我今天没时间跟你聊天。
又是那个气味，你没有闻到吗？
你大概是闻不出来那个气味了吧。
你到底造出那个智能迷你出货箱没？
它应该能让你一定程度的减少人力劳动。
你需要任何你能得到的帮助。
你花了好多力气去了解我。
请把这力用在能赚钱的事情上吧。
干嘛？你现在应该已经知道不应该像这样的打断我。
我今天是真的没办法像这样什么都不做还闲聊。
我希望你的农场一切都好。
你平时也是这样死缠烂打的吗？
这个村子开始稳步发展了，继续努力。
唉，仓库已经连续两季有积压了。
我不能让这影响这边的效率。
最近我发现很难维持库存。
你现在应该有足够收入去时不时享受一场赛猪比赛了吧。
我想让你知道，村子最近有点超预算了。
而我有办法补上这次的缺口
dialog.npc.banker.chatter_friendship5.10: 最近有没有煮什么特别的东西？
我真的吃这些粗茶淡饭吃厌了。
dialog.npc.banker.chatter_friendship5.11: 我没多少时间跟你闲聊，等会再说。
dialog.npc.banker.chatter_friendship5.12: 有人对你的目前进展非常满意，而且已经跟你亲口讲了。
dialog.npc.banker.chatter_friendship5.13: 最近好几家店都没什么库存啊。
你一定是在拓展业务了，非常厉害。
dialog.npc.banker.chatter_friendship5.14: 我真想来瓶上好的Cristel （in game有这个酒吗？）
dialog.npc.banker.chatter_friendship5.15: 你不该休息的，你还有很多事要干。
dialog.npc.banker.chatter_friendship5.16: 虽然你还没让我失望过，但这随时都会变的。
dialog.npc.banker.chatter_friendship5.17: 这小镇的财政稳定都靠你了。
dialog.npc.banker.intro.0.line_0: 我的名字是凯若琳，而我在你来这村子之前就帮这里做投资了。
dialog.npc.banker.intro.0.line_1: 你毫无顾忌的买光全部人的库存，我要加强这边的管理了。
dialog.npc.banker.intro.0.line_2: 我有卖些东西能让你更好的管理自己的钱。
dialog.npc.banker.intro.0.line_3: 现在，请离开吧，我要清理这烂地方了。我需要任何东西的时候会联系你的。
dialog.npc.banker.gift_loved.0.line_0: 我不知道原来你还懂点品味。
dialog.npc.banker.gift_loved.1.line_0: 你从哪个犄角旮旯找到这样的东西？
dialog.npc.banker.gift_loved.2.line_0: 或许这边没我想象中那么差。
dialog.npc.banker.gift_loved.3.line_0: 我的马会喜欢这样的东西。
dialog.npc.banker.gift_loved.4.line_0: 谁跟你说我喜欢这个的？你个滑头。
dialog.npc.banker.gift_loved.6.line_0: 闻起来就像是家的味道。
dialog.npc.banker.gift_loved.7.line_0: 在我这里，恭维能让任何事情发生。
dialog.npc.banker.gift_loved.8.line_0: 这来自你的农场吗？我希望你有卖更多这样的产品。
dialog.npc.banker.gift_liked.0.line_0: 我已经有好几个这东西了，我想再多一个能让我少去一次商店吧。
dialog.npc.banker.gift_liked.1.line_0: 这几乎没改变任何我对你的看法。
dialog.npc.banker.gift_liked.2.line_0: 我知道有个人会喜欢这个。
dialog.npc.banker.gift_liked.3.line_0: 这里终于有个懂礼貌的了。
dialog.npc.banker.gift_liked.5.line_0: 嗯，我想这个对我有用处。
dialog.npc.banker.gift_liked.7.line_0: 是时候你对我做点好事了。
dialog.npc.banker.gift_neutral.2.line_0: 你是觉得我很穷还是怎样？
dialog.npc.banker.gift_neutral.4.line_0: 你真的有尝试让我喜欢你吗？
dialog.npc.banker.gift_neutral.7.line_0: 你就拿这些破玩意浪费我时间。
dialog.npc.banker.gift_disliked.1.line_0: 像你这样的当然会给我这样的东西。
dialog.npc.banker.gift_disliked.8.line_0: 毫无品味，但我不知道为什么还会对你有所期待。
dialog.npc.banker.gift_disliked.11.line_: 你就用这种难看的镇纸来浪费我的时间。
dialog.npc.banker.gift_hated.0.line_0: 你拿着这东西在我面前滚开。
dialog.npc.banker.gift_hated.1.line_0: 我到底是为了什么来这种穷镇子。
dialog.npc.banker.gift_hated.2.line_0: 继续这么干你很快在这就看不到银行了。
dialog.npc.banker.gift_hated.4.line_0: 我不知道原来你对我的评价跟我对你的一样低。
dialog.npc.banker.gift_hated.8.line_0: 为你能做出这样的事情而对你的父母道歉。
dialog.npc.banker.gift_hated.14.line_0: 如果你就是这样管理这个镇子的，那我就是在浪费时间。
dialog.npc.banker.gift_hated.15.line_0: 别把我牵扯进你可笑的笑话里。
dialog.npc.banker.unique_five_gift.line_: 你好@i ，我想跟你稍微聊聊。我很高兴看到你为你农场做的进展。
不幸的是，目前的结果不符合我的时间表。你应该明白，我不会出手救场。
也许这本书能帮你提高机器的效率。
我欠了很多人人情才能拿到这东西，你最好给你仔细研读每一页。
我认识你这么久了，要是你糊弄我，我能看出来的。
你好@i，我想跟你稍微聊聊。对你农场的进展我很不高兴。
我知道你读过《Slouching Towards Artistry》，那你为什么不用里面的知识？
你现在应该知道，我不会帮你擦屁股的。无论你怎么讨好我都不行。
请好好利用这些古老的石头让你的时间管理进步。我不能让你就这样走来走去浪费时间。
现在走吧，别再让我失望了。
dialog.npc.blacksmith.name: 艾登
dialog.npc.blacksmith.chatter_friendship: 嘿呀，需要点什么？
你终于再帮这些工具升级了吗？
我能帮你做点什么， @i？
你好啊@i，你需要点什么？
你有闲置的晶球吗？我超爱用我的小槌子打开它们der！
今天是不是很忙啊@i？
别人提到帽贝时，出于礼貌，你应该问是哪种帽贝。
你的农场怎么样啦，@i？
在我搬来这镇子之前，艾斯跟我讲了好多关于这里的事情。
他们对自然的热爱真的很容易看得出！
嗯。。。 地底有好多自然资源，但是洞里也有好多怪物。
在下面小心一点 @i！
我发誓我有次在散步的时候看到了个长腿的煤炭。。。
我很确定在洞穴里有某种奇怪的魔法！
嗨 @i，今天农场怎么样啦？
你有机会去下矿了没？
你很快就会需要些我没卖的，来自地底的材料了。
如果你没空下矿收集材料做洒水器，我这里有好多存货！
啊我本来没打算推销你的！！我只是想确保你知道我这有卖的！！
地晶会发出柔和的光芒让它在洞穴在引人注目。
它们在我眼中比钻石更漂亮！
艾斯有天给了我这朵漂亮的花，很难相信你可以在野外找到它们！
虽然帮工具升级很重要，但也别忘了帮装甲也升升级！
如果你什么装都不穿，洞穴探险会很危险。
你有闲置的晶球吗？我超看你打开它们的！
你见过玛丽亚了吗？我没见过比她更懂动物的人了。
里昂真是位人物。。。
啊啊我今天不能聊天了 @i，太多事要干了！
我今天能为你做点什么 @i？
嗨呀 @i！ 你要点什么？
我今天看到了个超酷的蝴蝶！
它们好脆弱又好优雅。。。
玛丽亚好像从我这订了好多定制材料。。。
我好好奇是不是凯若琳帮她找了其他的供应商？
我不知道要不要相信里昂。。。
如果你不多加小心，有些人会利用你。
今天忙吗 @i？
最近还顺利吗 @i？
今天天气真好啊。
嗨呀 @i！我还在期待你今天会过来！
你要干啥去啊 @i？要升级金工具没？
好忙没时间聊天啦 @i，玛丽亚刚刚在我这下了好大一单！
我手腕真的好痛！我今天要歇一下了。。。
hmmm 好像没人买里昂店里的干草叉。
又或是某人又忘了入订单了。。。
你今天感觉怎样呀？今天天气真好！
艾斯每周用的工具数量真的很惊人！
每个在这里人的都很努力工作！
除了大概也许或者里昂。。。
艾斯昨晚跟我讲了好多关于头骨山洞的事情。。。
原来在沙漠洞穴里会有好多金矿跟铱矿！
还有，
我有天在散步的时候留意到有只帽贝在洞穴里看我！
多可爱的一个小蜗牛啊！
凯若琳用了我做的产品之后就不会用别的供应商的东西了。
虽然这算是对我的称赞，但是这也让我更忙啦。。。
你有听见里昂是怎么讲凯若琳的吗？
算了我不该散播谣言的，你自己问里昂去吧。
你好啊我的朋友！你需要点什么？
你好呀朋友！今天我能帮你做点什么？
嘿 @i！我刚还在想今天会不会很快能见到你！
我能怎样帮到你啊 @i？
你觉得春奈怎么样啊？我分不出她是单纯话少还是对人冷淡。。。
I wonder what Caroline is doing with all that gold she ordered recently.
嗨呀 @i！ 你需要点什么呀~！
欢迎回来，我好想你啊！
当我想家的时候，我会想想身边的这群优秀的小伙伴。
你当然也是优秀小伙伴中的一员啦！
hmm里昂还欠着我帮修好那架子的人情呢。。。我在想昂，能不能在市场里给我整点甜点！（pun def intended hehehehe）
唉我昨晚睡歪脖了。。。
但是呢今天见到你让我一整天都值啦！
今天买菜的时候里昂还给我顺带送了束花呢！
我有点内疚昂，把他的冷淡当初无礼了。（pun def intended！！！！！！！！！！）
哟哟哟， 这不是@i吗？你来啦？
你好啊朋友，你能帮你点什么？
今天天气好好啊 @i，你想要点什么？
你跟玫瑰闻起来一样！你最近是不是经常去鲜花森林探险呀？
这听起来听起来很荒谬，但我听说你能在那找到彩虹树。
有时我在干活的时候能听到春奈在唱歌！这里真的好祥和。。。
我好高兴我出来了，最近的生活真的很多姿多彩。（朋友你春心荡漾了是不是跟leon有进展了？）
♫ 嗨呀嘿呀 @i！♫
每次凯若琳来审计我，我就会莫名紧张。
她真的很严厉，但是我知道她是为我好。
如果你还没做的话，你该回头完成锅炉房啦。
工业化机器能让你的农场生活更轻松，也没什么不好的！
我觉得我对里昂改观了。  （！！！！！！！！！）
有些人充满棱角，是因为生活所逼。
虽然我不知道这能不能用在里昂身上。。。
大家都觉得打铁要用好多力气，但其实光有力气是不够的。
比如说像是柱星叶石跟electrum （不确定名称）需要更温柔的锻打。
每种金属都有自己的性格！
嘿呀 @i！你需要点啥？
欢迎回来，我一直都在想你！
嘿呀朋友！是不是想买点金属呀？
欢迎欢迎！跟朋友我永远都有时间。
（可以不翻译吧？）♫ 新的一天！新的开始！闪闪发光的早晨！♫
闪光石真是一个很奇妙的东西。它是月亮提纯后的元素，是月神塞勒涅的馈赠。
你有没有拿到过银矿啊？
虽然很少见，但是electrum工具真的很能提高产能！
艾斯昨天砍完树后给了点苔藓莓我！它们真的酸得恰到好处！
我爱山谷里的新鲜空气，让我想起家乡春天的玉兰花了。
里昂开始每天给我挥手了！那是不是我想的意思？
你帮你的工具升级到铱矿石没？
艾斯跟我提过说头骨洞穴的下层有更多资源！
我真希望能摸摸五彩碎片啊。。。
头骨洞穴对我这种人来说太危险了！
玛丽亚给我做了这件完美的毛衣帮我度过这个寒冬！（yea i feel you with the -30 winter...)
虽然很可惜这衣服给我穿有点小了，但是看看它也能让我很开心！
里昂对我讲了好话！
可能算是好话吧，我也不确定。
但至少我听了很开心！
dialog.npc.blacksmith.intro.0.line_0: 嘿呀@i！艾斯跟我讲了好多关于你对这个山谷的计划。
dialog.npc.blacksmith.intro.0.line_1: 我的名字是艾登，我会让你的耕作工具们闪闪发光的！
dialog.npc.blacksmith.intro.0.line_2: 如果你需要任何的工匠模板或者晶核破开器，你可以来我的商店。
dialog.npc.blacksmith.intro.0.line_3: 发展像这样的小镇很不简单，有任何需要的我会帮忙的！
dialog.npc.blacksmith.gift_loved.1.line_: You're gonna make me melt with something like this!
dialog.npc.blacksmith.gift_loved.2.line_: 啊啊！这也太棒了，我不能拿！
dialog.npc.blacksmith.gift_loved.3.line_: 我要感动哭了，这拿来整蛊人也太可爱了吧！
dialog.npc.blacksmith.gift_loved.4.line_: 你怎么知道我一直想要这个的！你真的太好人了！
dialog.npc.blacksmith.gift_loved.5.line_: 哇！@i，我不知原来你这么喜欢我。。。谢谢你！
dialog.npc.blacksmith.gift_loved.6.line_: 我何德何能拥有这么棒的朋友！！太谢谢你啦！
dialog.npc.blacksmith.gift_loved.7.line_: 你不能就这样走过来然后给我这么棒的礼物！
dialog.npc.blacksmith.gift_liked.0.line_: 哇你真的是个很棒的朋友@i！
dialog.npc.blacksmith.gift_liked.1.line_: 这让我感受到不一样的温暖。。。谢谢你@i！
dialog.npc.blacksmith.gift_liked.2.line_: 什么！！这样棒的礼物！谢谢你！
dialog.npc.blacksmith.gift_liked.3.line_: 你真的太棒了。。。真心谢谢你！
dialog.npc.blacksmith.gift_liked.5.line_: 你真的是个很好的朋友@i，谢谢你！
dialog.npc.blacksmith.gift_liked.7.line_: 你让我的心里开始唱歌了@i ~！
dialog.npc.blacksmith.gift_liked.8.line_: 你真的是个好人。。。谢谢你@i。
dialog.npc.blacksmith.gift_neutral.5.lin: 我想我可以用它来做点什么！
dialog.npc.blacksmith.gift_disliked.0.li: 我感谢你的好意但是我真的不是很喜欢这东西。
dialog.npc.blacksmith.gift_disliked.1.li: 我感谢你的好意但是我不是很需要这东西。
dialog.npc.blacksmith.gift_disliked.2.li: 我感谢你的好意但你应该更了解我才对！
这是衡量友情的重要标准。
dialog.npc.blacksmith.gift_disliked.4.li: 这不符合我的品味但没关系啦！
dialog.npc.blacksmith.gift_disliked.6.li: 如果你是问这个东西能不能融成任何东西，答案是不行。。。
dialog.npc.blacksmith.gift_disliked.7.li: 我永远不会对一个尝试对我好的人生气。
dialog.npc.blacksmith.gift_hated.0.line_: 对不起但是我不能让你这也对待我。
dialog.npc.blacksmith.gift_hated.1.line_: 你出去跑一圈清醒一下再回来。
dialog.npc.blacksmith.gift_hated.2.line_: 这不是你对朋友的应有态度。
dialog.npc.blacksmith.gift_hated.3.line_: 我是不是让你生气了？为什么这样对我啊。。。
dialog.npc.blacksmith.gift_hated.6.line_: 我希望我对你从未有过期待。
dialog.npc.blacksmith.gift_hated.7.line_: 等你心情好点再来跟我说话。
如果你继续对小镇上的人乱发脾气，我不会原谅你的。
dialog.npc.blacksmith.gift_hated.8.line_: 你为什么会给这样的东西我啊。。。
dialog.npc.blacksmith.gift_hated.9.line_: 我永远不会对一个尝试对我好的人生气。。。
dialog.npc.blacksmith.unique_five_gift.l: 噢，嘿嘿嘿这不是我最好的朋友@i吗！我这有点东西能让你的一天更棒！
我专门做的限量版采矿锤，免费送你！
我很确定你在建小镇时搬了好多石头，这东西应该能帮你干得更快。
啊对了这东西我没告诉过凯若琳，所以别在她面前炫耀噢。你知道她对预算多紧张的。。。
dialog.npc.carpenter.name: 艾斯
dialog.npc.carpenter.chatter_friendship0: 我卖的蓝图有全部你起房子需要的材料，不用自己准备！
不用到处准备建筑材料，我这里都有！
随处可见的野莓真的是最好的工地加餐！
不要忽视跟荨麻一样的野生植物，你可以用这样的植物来泡很好喝的茶！
如果你知道方法的话，大自然充满了价值高多用处的植物。
我会尽量在你需要我的时候很容易找到我！
如果你在野外到处都找不到你想要的树，我店里有些树苗卖噢！
有空来我店里看看，可能会有为别的村民发明的商品在售卖。
你开始学会管理农场了没？邀请人来管理市场能让你买到新种子。
dialog.npc.carpenter.chatter_friendship1: 要是你在洞里找到了地晶，一定要做点树液采集器。
你能从不同树里拿到不同的，珍贵的树液。
在我在外面冒险的时候找到了个荒芜的农舍。。。
我好奇为什么农舍主人会抛弃它。
建筑商店里有好多能用在你农场里的蓝图。
我只需一点基本材料就能建造那些房子了。
我今天能为你做点什么，@i？
土豆是唯一一种能在野外都能生存的农作物！我每次都会试着在野外找它们的踪迹。
花时间去升级你农场的基建是很值得的。
你可以用航行图（名称未定）来连接你的行进路线来进行快速移动！
要是没带召回药水我一定不会离开家，在野外要是没它真的很危险。
记得做点准备再下矿，我早前在矿洞里看到了看起来就很危险的怪物
啊嘿@i，我今天不能跟你聊太久。我要准备去长途徒步啊！
dialog.npc.carpenter.chatter_friendship2: 你的农场怎么样啦@i？
啊啊我终于觉得这里有归属感了，终于可以放松点了。
今天要建点什么？
技术上来说，你不用买我的畜棚，但是小动物们真的不喜欢在下雨的时候待在外面。
一个好的棚屋能让你工匠用品保持整洁。
这么多空地要勘测，我真的每天都精疲力竭了。
嘿@i！你今天想来点什么？
你去认识里昂了吗？你该去认识镇子上的每个人！
而且我认真的，每一个人。。。
确保你有好好的跟每个你邀请来的村民聊天。
自己一个长途跋涉的从家里离开到这个宜居地的确会让人容易觉得孤独。
你该去问问玛丽亚怎么能得到个宠物松鼠！它们会帮你找坚果和野莓！
我猜它们在某些方面跟我蛮像的！
别看我这样，其实我对物流一窍不通！
凱若琳在这个鎮子开始之初搞定了很多很难解決的事情
我喜欢在野外採集食物時的宁静。
如果你停下來聆听可以听见小小动物的轻语。
至少保留一朵每种你在野外找到的花。
只需一点骨粉它們就会长得超快，跟农作物和树苗不一样。
而且艾登很喜欢花，特別是我在野外找到的独特的花。
dialog.npc.carpenter.chatter_friendship3: 这个农季你有没有种新的农作物啊@i？
凯若琳是唯二知道春奈是从哪里来的人。
为什么这事情这么神秘呢。。。但我想有些事还是不要过多深究。
啊啊啊 @i，你要不要来给我帮忙，我在自己雕墙面木条。
春奈尝试过教我怎么钓鱼。我唯一能钓到的就是她的发圈。。。
我一直都很期待苔藓莓的季节。在砍树的时候忽然掉下一颗饱满多汁的绿色果实真的太棒啦！
大多数树都挺容易活的。但是云杉好像不太喜欢夏天的样子。
你要不要试试看能不能造出个捕虫网！
我在探险的时候发现了一大堆蝴蝶！
dialog.npc.carpenter.chatter_friendship4: 嘿@i，你的农资发展得怎么样啦？
Sorry I can't chat, I'm a bit behind on my resource collection this week.
Caroline has me working on furniture this week! It's a shame these are all designated as exports to other colonies.
Haruna's smoked salmon is something else, it's perfect for long days in the wild!
I still haven't figured out what's up with those birts... I should ask Maria.
Dehydrated fruits make great travel food. The market has a dehydrator for sale if you're interested.
Leon gave me some samples of this season's produce! You can really taste the freshness from your farm.
Seems like Aiden sharpened my axe when I wasn't looking, what a kind soul.
dialog.npc.carpenter.chatter_friendship5: I really appreciate what Caroline's done for the town.
Most people aren't aware of it from the outside, but she's done so much for everyone
I wonder if there's a way we can get Haruna home...
At least for a vist. I'd hate to see Haruna gone forever.
On my last expedition I found some wild penguins! I should get some for Maria.
Make sure you have the right equipment before diving into the Skull Cavern.
Wouldn't want anything to happen to you.
I'm really happy with what we've managed to build here, @i.
Mushroom logs are a great way to make money from planting trees, you should have some on your farm!
Mystic willows are so pretty, I wonder if Caroline knows where to find the saplings.
Grow any new crops this season @i?
I'm sure dealing with seasons has been a burden on your farm. I can build you a greenhouse or two if you need!
Just need some of that greenhouse glass first.
Leon is a sucker for red wine, so glad I kept some wild berries around to make some.
I don't know how Aiden manages to make all this industrial iron for some of my buildings.
dialog.npc.carpenter.intro.0.line_0: Hey stranger, my name is Ace. I'm here to help you build the village you're starting in Sunlit Valley.
dialog.npc.carpenter.intro.0.line_1: If you're looking to invite more villagers, come talk to me and I can help you build homes for them.
dialog.npc.carpenter.intro.0.line_2: If you'd prefer to do the building yourself, just let me know and I can sell any building supplies you'll need.
dialog.npc.carpenter.intro.0.line_3: You really have your work cut out for you here, come see me if you need anything!
dialog.npc.carpenter.gift_loved.0.line_0: Who told you I like these? What a fantastic gift @i!
dialog.npc.carpenter.gift_loved.1.line_0: Thank you so much, this is an incredible gift.
dialog.npc.carpenter.gift_loved.2.line_0: You're a really good friend you know that @i?
dialog.npc.carpenter.gift_loved.3.line_0: Thank you, this is very special to me.
dialog.npc.carpenter.gift_loved.4.line_0: This will really help me out in the field! Thank you so much @i!
dialog.npc.carpenter.gift_loved.5.line_0: Wow, thank you @i! Grand gestures like these mean so much to me!
dialog.npc.carpenter.gift_liked.0.line_0: Things like these help me out while I'm exploring the field
dialog.npc.carpenter.gift_liked.1.line_0: That's so kind of you, I was thinking about picking this up soon.
dialog.npc.carpenter.gift_liked.2.line_0: You read my mind @i, I was running out of these!
dialog.npc.carpenter.gift_liked.3.line_0: Thank you, I can't wait to get done working today so I can use this.
dialog.npc.carpenter.gift_liked.4.line_0: That's very nice of you, going out of your way to get me this with that busy schedule you have means a lot.
dialog.npc.carpenter.gift_liked.5.line_0: I'm a little awkward when reciving gifts but trust me I do like this!
dialog.npc.carpenter.gift_liked.6.line_0: Thank you @i, large gestures like these mean a lot.
dialog.npc.carpenter.gift_neutral.0.line: Thank you @i, small gestures like these mean a lot.
dialog.npc.carpenter.gift_neutral.4.line: Thank you kindly, that's very considerate.
dialog.npc.carpenter.gift_neutral.5.line: This kind of thing will help make the long days feel shorter, thank you!
dialog.npc.carpenter.gift_neutral.7.line: You were thinking of me @i? That's very kind.
dialog.npc.carpenter.gift_disliked.3.lin: Oh okay... Please don't give me any more of these.
dialog.npc.carpenter.gift_disliked.4.lin: Gift giving isn't your strong suit I'm guessing?
dialog.npc.carpenter.gift_disliked.5.lin: I wonder if I can make tree fertilizer out of this...
dialog.npc.carpenter.gift_disliked.6.lin: Did Leon tell you I like this? That's not a very funny prank...
dialog.npc.carpenter.gift_disliked.7.lin: I'm glad you're not littering but surely there's a better place with it!
dialog.npc.carpenter.gift_disliked.8.lin: What do you mean you're giving this to me? Why?
dialog.npc.carpenter.gift_disliked.9.lin: Why did you think I would like this?
dialog.npc.carpenter.gift_hated.0.line_0: This is extremely disrespectful. Get away from me.
dialog.npc.carpenter.gift_hated.1.line_0: Get out of my face with that you hateful piece of dirt.
dialog.npc.carpenter.gift_hated.2.line_0: When you wake up in the morning I hope you reflect on what kind of person you're trying to be
dialog.npc.carpenter.gift_hated.3.line_0: Treating people horribly won't get you anywhere around here.
dialog.npc.carpenter.gift_hated.4.line_0: All you do is take take take from everyone around you.
dialog.npc.carpenter.gift_hated.4.line_1: This is what you give back?
dialog.npc.carpenter.gift_hated.5.line_0: I wasn't aware you were that kind of person.
dialog.npc.carpenter.gift_hated.5.line_1: Maybe coming here was a mistake.
dialog.npc.carpenter.gift_hated.6.line_1: Get away from me with that.
dialog.npc.carpenter.gift_hated.7.line_0: It's a cold world out here. Give me more garbage like this and you'll end up alone.
dialog.npc.carpenter.gift_hated.8.line_0: What did I do to deserve this treatment.
dialog.npc.carpenter.gift_hated.9.line_0: I don't have to be here you know.
dialog.npc.carpenter.unique_five_gift.li: Hey @i, do you have time to chat? I wanted to show you what I've been working on all this time!
It's the Blockapedia! A complete set of all the building blocks I could manage to get my hands on.
Knowing how much you care about this town, I feel confident entrusting my little hobby project to you.
I couldn't manage to find mystic willow logs though, I had to call in a favor to Caroline to get some blocks made with them...
I appreciate everything you've done for this town, and I hope you'll find this useful when building it out more!
Need to pick up something from the shop?
dialog.npc.fisher.name: Haruna
It's a long way from home.
There is a sadness in loneliness.
Stars fall all the time, such as I on new ground.
Hmmm? Apologies, I was lost in thought.
Ah, I was told I should sell you a fishing rod.
I also have some bait for sale if you pick up a tackle box as well.
Fishing is a serene joy that's best enjoyed on your own.
dialog.npc.fisher.chatter_friendship0.10: I'm fishing right now, if you could excuse me.
I wonder who is writing all these messages in bottles.
I hope they don't mind my curiosity.
Aiden might be the largest person I've ever seen. So tall...
Ace is an anomaly to me, such is a person I cannot read.
Where I come from, we use a lot more Neptunium.
A glow like the stars of home
There's many unique fish in these waters. I'd like to get acquainted with them.
If you're not great at fishing I recommend trying a cork bobber.
How can I help you today @i?
♫ My life, my love and my lady... ♫
♫ Take me by the hand, lead me to the land... ♫
I see Morana on the shimmer of the still ocean.
Rivers have their own beautiful bounties.
Ace told me about sea pancakes! I'd like to see them...
Leon is very honest, I like that in a person.
Where I come from, everyone is well versed in the ways of fish.
I have never met someone as bad at fishing as Ace...
Want to try some different bobbers? I have a wide variety of them.
♫ Letting the days go by, let the water hold me down... ♫
There's something about the waters in these lands...
It's as if the sun is rebelling against the magic of the waves
You can't let it distract you from your catch, though.
Caroline respects what I do, yet doesn't come around here often...
It's curious. Fresh fish can come from salt water or fresh water...
And to keep fish fresh, you can salt them.
Have you checked your fish ponds today?
Do you think Ace can do anything with all of this driftwood I've found?
The fish here can be... unusual.
Bait Makers are convenient, but steady hands catch the best fish.
The waves crash against the shore
Maria is too sweet to understand the natural cycle of life and death.
Folks work and play and harvest
Fishing really takes you to all sorts of places.
Beaches, rivers, glaciers, islands... even volcanoes.
The markets at sea are quite volatile, you know.
I used to make most of my money from bounties.
Where does all this jelly come from?
♫ The clatter and clank, goes from tank to tank! ♫
Always refreshing to hear from you.
It's a lovely day for fishing.
It's been a while since I've been out at sea.
This place is quite magnetic, I suppose.
Such a big valley, and so many fish to catch...
Woe is the fisher with the empty rod...
A sonet of deepfish, the organ of the cavernous waters.
Sneep snorp... Sneep snorp... What a rhythm the name of a fish has.
I'm growing quite attached to Maria's love of animals. It's very endearing!
dialog.npc.fisher.chatter_friendship5.10: I always enjoy sharing some wine with Leon on colder nights.
dialog.npc.fisher.intro.0.line_0: Hello, my name is Haruna, I'm looking to carve out a home for myself in your town.
dialog.npc.fisher.intro.0.line_1: I can get you started with learning how to fish. It's slow work that requires lots of patience.
dialog.npc.fisher.intro.0.line_2: These waters aren't as fresh as the ones in my homeland, but I can make do with them for now...
dialog.npc.fisher.gift_loved.0.line_0: You must have put a lot of thought into this.
dialog.npc.fisher.gift_loved.1.line_0: Little joys like these give me a reason to sing, @i.
dialog.npc.fisher.gift_loved.2.line_0: You know me all too well, you're a gem of the land.
dialog.npc.fisher.gift_loved.3.line_0: Truly this is a wonderful gift. It reminds me of home.
dialog.npc.fisher.gift_loved.4.line_0: Thank you @i. I feel very welcome here.
dialog.npc.fisher.gift_loved.6.line_0: Such kindness cannot be repaid by me, but it would be rude to not accept such a gift.
dialog.npc.fisher.gift_liked.2.line_0: Almost as sweet as the sound of evening waves.
dialog.npc.fisher.gift_liked.3.line_0: I appreciate this more than you'll know.
dialog.npc.fisher.gift_liked.4.line_0: You've got a knack for giving gifts @i.
dialog.npc.fisher.gift_liked.5.line_0: This is a brisk wind on a warm day, weclome and appreciated.
dialog.npc.fisher.gift_neutral.3.line_0: Hmmm do you think one of the others would like this as well?
dialog.npc.fisher.gift_neutral.4.line_0: I could use this as an offerring for the stars, thank you.
dialog.npc.fisher.gift_neutral.5.line_0: I was looking to experiment with new kinds of bobbers, thank you.
dialog.npc.fisher.gift_neutral.7.line_0: It's strange, people here give me random things like this. I'm still not used to it.
dialog.npc.fisher.gift_neutral.8.line_0: I'm not sure what use I have for this but I appreciate the gesture.
dialog.npc.fisher.gift_disliked.0.line_0: I suppose I'd rather hold onto this than let it destroy a habitat.
dialog.npc.fisher.gift_disliked.1.line_0: Some things are better kept than given.
dialog.npc.fisher.gift_disliked.2.line_0: I'm not sure if I care for this...
dialog.npc.fisher.gift_disliked.3.line_0: In my culture, this is considered a "faux pas".
dialog.npc.fisher.gift_disliked.4.line_0: How I wish there were a shell I could be listening to right now.
dialog.npc.fisher.gift_disliked.5.line_0: I don't think I can even use this as bait...
dialog.npc.fisher.gift_disliked.6.line_0: Does this pass for a joke here?
dialog.npc.fisher.gift_hated.0.line_0: Did this wash ashore with the detritus I saw earlier?
dialog.npc.fisher.gift_hated.1.line_0: I wonder if it's safe to sail back home.
dialog.npc.fisher.gift_hated.3.line_0: Perhaps I should erect a "Gone Fishing" sign in my stead.
dialog.npc.fisher.gift_hated.4.line_0: How long did you think about this?
dialog.npc.fisher.gift_hated.6.line_0: Just because I like the sea doesn't mean I like sea garbage.
dialog.npc.fisher.unique_five_gift.line_: Hello @i, I have a small token of appreciation for you.
I haven't spent all that long in this land, yet you continue to treat me as if you've known me your entire life.
This pendant is a mystical relic from where I come from. Ancient magi would infuse it with neptunium to summon a giant sea-serpent.
Ahh, but don't worry about that! These waters are too mundane for it to have any use here.
Hopefully this brings you a tiny bit closer to understanding my soul.
dialog.npc.goddess.name: Selene
dialog.npc.goddess.unique_skull_cavern_h: That's an interesting little tool you have there. Did Aiden help you make that?
In any case, I cannot allow you to use that here. Someone before you once wielded that curse in my caverns...
Their soul fissured from their own body after an hour, vanishing instantly...
Leave that monstrous thing at home.
(This has been disabled for performance reasons but can be changed in _config.js)
dialog.npc.goddess.unique_skull_cavern_s: Oh my, it seems my brother has gotten his hooks into you.
Only the power of the sun could make a tool so wretched and greedy.
I cannot allow you to use that here, it's so... Unsightly...
Leave that slight of the moon at home.
(This has been disabled for performance reasons but can be changed in _config.js)
dialog.npc.market.name: Leon
What can I help you with?
Welcome to the Sunlit Market! How can I help you~
I really hope I can get away with not saying that ever again.
If you're looking for saplings, ask Ace.
Those things leave so much dirt around and I can't be bothered to sweep it.
I hope Ace gives me back that copy of Wuthering Logs...
I want to read it before watching the new film adaptation.
Wait I'm not supposed to say stuff like that...
Welcome to the market, what can I do for you!
I was told to make sure you know about fertilizers.
I feel like someone in your position would know about them already though.
Oh? You're telling me you need more seeds?
I can't imagine wanting to be out in the fields all day.
dialog.npc.market.chatter_friendship0.10: I'm going to miss going to the cinema every week.
I can't imagine Ace has the plans drawn up for one at the moment.
dialog.npc.market.chatter_friendship0.11: You look exhuasted, starting a farm must be taking it out of you.
dialog.npc.market.chatter_friendship0.12: I'm not used to this much solitude.
It'd be nice if it wasn't so boring...
dialog.npc.market.chatter_friendship0.13: Takes me a solid month to get used to sleeping in a new bed.
dialog.npc.market.chatter_friendship0.14: Another quiet day in the valley.
dialog.npc.market.chatter_friendship0.15: It's deathly quiet out here in the wilderness.
Going to take me some time to get used to.
dialog.npc.market.chatter_friendship0.16: You know, the less planting you do the less you have to come here.
Just slow down a little, the money can always wait.
dialog.npc.market.chatter_friendship0.17: Ace is starting to annoy me with all that hammering.
All this open area, the sound travels so far.
Happy cashiers are all alike, but every unhappy cashier is unhappy in their own way...
No need to look around for anything, I've learned where everything is now.
...I was hoping you would walk away by now...
Remind me, where does your name come from?
Every name has a story, even if you're not aware of it.
When do you get done with working? Do you ever really finish a work day?
If you need anything specific, let me know.
dialog.npc.market.chatter_friendship1.10: He's so nice to me... I wonder what he wants from me.
dialog.npc.market.chatter_friendship1.11: Got any stories from your adventures?
dialog.npc.market.chatter_friendship1.12: People don't really like to cook around here.
You'd make more money selling premade meals than just selling crops.
dialog.npc.market.chatter_friendship1.13: Why are you even doing all this farming?
It's not like there's anything to buy out here
Can you tell Caroline I've been very professional with you?
She doesn't like when I get casual and I really can't be bothered.
Can you hurry up and buy something, I'm really tired right now.
I'm running low on stock this week so go easy on me.
I don't know why everyone around here is so suspicious of me, I just like my peace and quiet...
Why does a town this small even need a market. If you ask me, everyone should just barter for food.
Caroline's weekly report is overdue, I hope she's not too mad about it.
I don't think I'm gonna be able to convince you to do it for me... Unless?
Read any classics lately? Or are you still running around from dusk till dawn every day.
Ugh, Caroline's workers are late again today...
She gets mad when they catch me napping
I don't really know much about farming.
The Farmer's Almanac is such a dry read, I haven't bothered to look at it.
I don't care much for the natural beauty of the countryside.
The growth of this town is much more inspiring to me
Why isn't a cutting board just made with wood?
I need to speak with Ace, that doesn't make any sense.
Caroline complained to me the other day about my markup...
Getting books shipped out here isn't cheap, I need that money!
Hey there, what do you need
How can I help you today?
Ugh, Haruna's been stinking up the market lately with her fish...
I could go for some caviar right now...
Is it socially acceptable to eat dinner yet?
Why do you like gardenining so much? Isn't it a little tedious?
Have you met any Ribbits yet? They fascinate me...
dialog.npc.market.chatter_friendship3.11: The night is so beautiful and harsh out here.
dialog.npc.market.chatter_friendship3.12: She's not an easy person to talk to, but she's very well connected.
dialog.npc.market.chatter_friendship3.13: If everything is permitted, why does Caroline bother me so?
dialog.npc.market.chatter_friendship3.14: Can't wait to get my package. What's taking them so long?
Maybe I should talk to Caroline... Just to check.
dialog.npc.market.chatter_friendship3.15: Have you spoke to Caroline today?
Did she say anything about my behavior? I really hope not.
I can keep you stocked with bottles if you ever want to get into wine making.
Has Caroline said anything about me to you?
Just curious, I don't think it matters either way.
I wonder what Maria's up to today...
Finally, someone to talk to. It's been so quiet today.
Caroline hasn't been around in a while...
I hope that means I'm doing alright here.
Have you ever been to emporio? Or did you not get out much back then
I miss all my old friends, have they moved on by now?
dialog.npc.market.chatter_friendship4.10: When it rains I feel this sense of dread, as if it's washing away my protective coating.
dialog.npc.market.chatter_friendship4.11: I've been missing the comforts of living in a big city.
Everything is so slow around here! I don't have the patience for it.
dialog.npc.market.chatter_friendship4.12: I've been dying to talk to someone lately.
You'd think people would be coming by here more often...
dialog.npc.market.chatter_friendship4.13: Has Haruna taken a trip to the Ocean recently?
I gave her some film for the beach to take photos but I'm guessing she forgot about it.
Happy cashiers are all alike, but every unhappy cashier is unhappy in their own way...
...But I'm always happy to see you @i!
I've been reading about the arcane magic of the Skull Cavern.
Have you had a visit yet?
Do you think Caroline ever gets along with anyone?
I wonder if she has a soft side...
I'm kinda over this whole groceries thing.
Is my only task in this short life to sort products?
I could use a cold glass of wine right about now.
Have you had the time to go out exploring yet?
I'm sure there's some tasty things out there I haven't tried.
The best thing about living out here is the freshness of everything
I never realized blueberries had such strong flavor!
I wonder, are Magic Shears ethical?
I'm sure if they weren't Maria wouldn't sell them...
I'd much rather you exploit nature than other people.
Nature always gets its revenge, while the weak have no advocates.
Caroline visited me the other day! She seemed happy with our sales this season.
Please dont let me dissapoint her!
dialog.npc.market.chatter_friendship5.10: Caroline has really relaxed lately, have you been sweet talking her?
dialog.npc.market.chatter_friendship5.11: Were you ever much of a reader before moving here
Literature can be inspiring, it's the frontier of the mind after all.
dialog.npc.market.chatter_friendship5.12: Have you started making wine yet?
I could use some of that about now...
dialog.npc.market.chatter_friendship5.13: Found any interesting wild crops lately?
I could use something fun to eat.
dialog.npc.market.intro.0.line_0: Hey @i, I'm Leon. I was sent here to manage the local farmer's market.
dialog.npc.market.intro.0.line_1: I'll be making sure you have seeds and some basic farming supplies.
dialog.npc.market.intro.0.line_2: In return some of your produce will be sent here for the other villagers.
dialog.npc.market.intro.0.line_3: Please don't be like all the other farmers that wake up at 6am...
dialog.npc.market.gift_loved.0.line_0: Small kindnesses like these really break up the drudgery of daily life.
dialog.npc.market.gift_loved.0.line_1: I'm very thankful you're part of the melange.
dialog.npc.market.gift_loved.2.line_0: This is mesmerizing. I'll cherish it forever.
dialog.npc.market.gift_loved.3.line_0: What a gift. To know me like this is the mark of a true friend.
dialog.npc.market.gift_loved.4.line_0: Nobody around here would know I like this. Am I really that fascinating to you?
dialog.npc.market.gift_loved.5.line_0: To love someone means to see them as Selene intended them.
dialog.npc.market.gift_loved.6.line_0: This is a fine gift from a finer person!
dialog.npc.market.gift_loved.7.line_0: Aesthetically perfect. A work of art.
dialog.npc.market.gift_loved.8.line_0: I can't stop looking at it...
dialog.npc.market.gift_loved.8.line_1: How on earth did you get your hands on this...
dialog.npc.market.gift_loved.9.line_0: It is the ultimate respect to recieve a masterwork from someone at the height of their craft.
dialog.npc.market.gift_liked.0.line_0: It's always pleasent to recieve a gift like this.
dialog.npc.market.gift_liked.1.line_0: Nothing is easier than flattery, not that I mind!
dialog.npc.market.gift_liked.2.line_0: It's much better to do good in a way that...
dialog.npc.market.gift_liked.2.line_1: No that's not right. I like this way more.
dialog.npc.market.gift_liked.3.line_0: You're very appreciated, I hope you know.
dialog.npc.market.gift_liked.4.line_0: The margins on seeds aren't great, little luxuries like this go a long way!
dialog.npc.market.gift_liked.6.line_0: Thank you, I really needed the pick-me-up!
dialog.npc.market.gift_liked.7.line_0: It's been so slow today, finally something nice happened!
dialog.npc.market.gift_neutral.3.line_0: Are you handing these out to everyone?
dialog.npc.market.gift_neutral.4.line_0: It looks high quality but it's not really to my taste.
dialog.npc.market.gift_neutral.5.line_0: In a way, something this ugly has a certain beauty to it! Exciting!
dialog.npc.market.gift_neutral.6.line_0: I do love a gift! Even if its not quite one I want!
dialog.npc.market.gift_neutral.7.line_0: I'm not really sure how to react to this but thank you for the kindness.
dialog.npc.market.gift_neutral.8.line_0: I have plenty random objects for still life at my shop, but thank you!
dialog.npc.market.gift_neutral.9.line_0: If you keep giving me things you'll eventually find one I actually like!
dialog.npc.market.gift_neutral.10.line_1: Life is lived in the details, and you need to pay more attention!
dialog.npc.market.gift_neutral.13.line_0: You could have put a little more thought into this.
dialog.npc.market.gift_neutral.14.line_0: I don't hate this for some reasonn.
dialog.npc.market.gift_neutral.15.line_0: Are you even listening to me when I speak to you?
dialog.npc.market.gift_neutral.16.line_0: Someone around here will definitely like this, I'm sure.
dialog.npc.market.gift_disliked.0.line_0: Ahhh I didn't know you were actually an ascetic!
dialog.npc.market.gift_disliked.0.line_1: I thought that was just your look...
dialog.npc.market.gift_disliked.1.line_0: I guess someone who spends so much time digging in the dirt doesn't have time to enjoy the finer things.
dialog.npc.market.gift_disliked.2.line_0: Ahhh I really hope you tried your best.
dialog.npc.market.gift_disliked.4.line_0: I don't really want that. Or need it.
dialog.npc.market.gift_disliked.5.line_0: You can be sincere and still be...
dialog.npc.market.gift_disliked.6.line_0: Let's be real I'm just gonna toss this when you walk away.
dialog.npc.market.gift_disliked.7.line_0: Oh! I'm actually really busy right now.
dialog.npc.market.gift_disliked.7.line_1: Some seeds ran away, I really need to catch them?
dialog.npc.market.gift_disliked.8.line_0: Be real with me are you just pulling random stuff from your pocket to give to me?
dialog.npc.market.gift_disliked.9.line_0: Woah! I don't really want this!
dialog.npc.market.gift_disliked.10.line_: I don't like things like this.
dialog.npc.market.gift_hated.3.line_0: A beast can never be as cruel as a human being, so artistically, so picturesquely cruel.
dialog.npc.market.gift_hated.4.line_0: I hope you aren't this inept at farming.
dialog.npc.market.gift_hated.5.line_0: When you look in the mirror at night, think of all that is wasted on you.
dialog.npc.market.gift_hated.6.line_0: You are senseless and I don't enjoy you.
dialog.npc.market.gift_hated.7.line_0: What kind of person do you take me for?
dialog.npc.market.gift_hated.8.line_0: It takes something more than intelligence to act intelligently.
dialog.npc.market.gift_hated.9.line_0: I deserve better than to be treated like this.
dialog.npc.market.gift_hated.12.line_0: You are a child, get away from me.
dialog.npc.market.unique_five_gift.line_: Ahhh just the person I wanted to see today! I have a bit of a request for you.
Caroline's making me read this really dry book on farming, and I really can't be bothered...
But you're a farmer! A really good one at that, and I'd know more than anyone else here.
Sooooo.... Can you please read this book for me and give me a quick summary on it?
In return I'll convince Caroline to let me carry seeds of every season all the time!
It's a win win but I know you'd do it either way since you seem absolutely infatuated with me.
Hey @i, you look like the type of person who's read Universal Methods of Farming, am I right?
Sorry I don't mean to call you a nerd. I mean you definitely are a farming nerd there's no doubt about that.
But I digress and I'll cut to the chase. Can you give me a quick summary on it?
Caroline's making me read this really dry book on farming, and I really can't be bothered...
I'll give you some of these rare sparkpod seeds in advance, it really is a win win!
Although... I know you'd do it either way since you seem absolutely infatuated with me.
dialog.npc.shepherd.name: Maria
Hello there, need anything?
I'm not used to being out in the wild like this.
It's exciting to see all the wildlife!
How's your farm going?
Have you gotten started with some animals yet?
It's eerie here at night, I'm not used to this must open air.
Do you need something?
Need to pick something up?
The valley is full of wild slimes...
They always catch me off gaurd and pop out of nowhere.
Have you seen Ace around?
What can I do for you today?
Hello @i.
I could use a warm cup of coffee right now...
I'm often skeptical of new farmers I see try to take on ranching.
Some of them have a rotten soul unfit to care for them.
I'm not sure about Leon...
I've never met someone so distant.
Always curious about where these new farmers will end up.
Not everyone's cut out for the hard life of labor.
Everyone here is so friendly, it kinda weirds me out.
No not like that! I'm just not used to it!
I saw some wild sheep roaming around the other day.
They look like they could use a warm barn...
No need to stop around so often
I'm more than capable of handling myself out here.
When you choose a name for your animals, it creates a special bond between you and them.
Make sure you name them something that fits their personality!
How are things on your farm?
Everything is so calm and simple around here...
I'm excited to see how things change over time.
Ace gave me some Salmonberries to munch on today!
No wonder I see squirrels digging around for them all the time.
Feel free to stop by if you have any questions about animals.
Do you want something?
How are you today?
Hey @i, what can I do for you?
Everybody lies, but animals will always tell you the truth.
Except racoons, those always try and trick you!
How is Aiden so cheerful standing in that heat all day?
Why did Leon even move out here?
I've never met someone that hates nature more.
I miss the stray cats of the city I grew up in...
Stray sheep are a different kind of nice though!
All these new people in town...
Moving to a new town sure is rough.
I've seen some nasty farmers out there that treat their animals cruelly.
Giant holding penns stuffed to the brim... Makes me sick...
I'm glad you're not like that!
Running low on animal feed?
Or are you here to adopt!
I've been loving seeing all the wild animals run around freely lately.
There's something about the air here that's so freeing.
I hope you're feeding your animals every day.
You'd be grumpy to if you had to skip a meal!
You should see if you can make a Catching Net!
There's so many wonderful butterflies around the valley.
I don't have the heart to garden, all my plants always end up over-watered...
I love the feeling of weaving on a Canvas Loom.
There's nothing quite like it.
Leon was so sour today when I went to get groceries.
People can be so mean when they're tired.
People's hearts are often unveiled with their treatment of animals.
Some people can be so disappointing in life.
Ahh but nobody here is like that! Probably...
Grains like Wheat and Corn can be made into Animal Feed.
I'm sure your animals will appreciate fresher food than what I've got!
Need more feed?
Have you considered ranching pigs?
Truffles are great for making donuts!
Have you talked to Aiden recently?
I really need that order of pails...
Animals have no concept of the evils we are capable of.
It's our job to make sure they never find out.
You can tell a lot about a person by the way they approach a scared animal.
I was reading about Minisheep today in the farmer's almanac.
...So fluffy...
Caroline is a sucker for goat cheese.
Don't mention I said that! I want to know more secrets...
Leon has sewing supplies stocked at the market.
Let me know if you need lessons!
Caroline has some expensive taste.
Most people don't have an eye for proper merino wool.
Your hands are so calloused!
Let me take a look later, I have a serum made from sheeps milk that will help.
Do you ever think about what our animals dream about?
Someone like you could really use some pets.
I bet it gets lonely over where you are.
Originally I thought Leon disliked me in particular.
Turns out they're just like that.
There's nothing as sweet as the love of an animal.
Hey @i, what are you up to today?
How's your ranch going today?
You sure like spending time with me.
Or maybe you have some sort of ulterior motive...
You really have no rythm when talking to me.
I never know when to expect you.
I wonder if building out this town effects your ego in any way.
People here will always keep you humble I bet!
Caroline can be so mean!
It's one of the more frustrating things of living here.
There's so much to industrial farming that I dislike.
I understand the realities of keeping society going...
Just don't mistreat animals, I'll know.
There's a myth around farmers that having too many animals will incur the wrath of Selene.
She's so real...
Have you heard about goobers?
I've heard they're native place called the Skull Cavern, wherever that is.
Ace was telling me about mossberries the other day.
I bet they'd make a great jam.
People around here will just come up to me and tell me their secrets.
I guess I look trusting to them?
I've been knitting some sweaters for the harsh winters around here.
Not that you need one for all that running around you do every day!
Leon let me sample some of your animal products the other day.
Everything was so fresh and full of flavor!
Leon sure likes talking about Caroline.
I wonder what that's about...
People sometimes think that I don't like people just because I have a love of animals.
I'm glad you're not one of them
Ahh! I was looking for you @i.
What's on your schedule @i?
What can I do for you?
Some people think they can win me over with gifts and small talk.
That's not a real connection, and you know that.
You've really got an eye for getting to know people.
You're very easy to talk to so it makes sense.
The way a shima enaga tilts its tiny head is a wonder of the world.
Truly a snow fairy!
What a calm day today...
What would you like?
People think pigs are monsters for what people force them to eat.
Animals teach us so much about humanity.
Ace wants to see you about something.
I wonder what you to talk about when nobody's looking.
I knew I'd see you today, I stocked some extra feed ahead of time!
Caroline isn't one of those people that's a sweetheart once you get to know them.
Usually I'm right about these things.
Your ambitions are so frightening to me...
I hope pulling up the roots of this valley is worth whatever you're trying to accomplish.
There's something so nice about the way an animal looks at you with loving eyes.
Nothing quite like it.
dialog.npc.shepherd.intro.0.line_0: Hello, my name is Maria. I'll be here to get you started ranching on your farm.
dialog.npc.shepherd.intro.0.line_1: Raising animals take lots of time, energy and care.
dialog.npc.shepherd.intro.0.line_2: In the end seeing the look on a happy animal's face is well worth it!
dialog.npc.shepherd.intro.0.line_3: If you need any supplies just let me know.
dialog.npc.shepherd.gift_loved.0.line_0: This makes me feel very at home.
dialog.npc.shepherd.gift_loved.1.line_0: You're so sweet to me, this is one of my favorites!
dialog.npc.shepherd.gift_loved.2.line_0: This is one of my favorites!
dialog.npc.shepherd.gift_loved.3.line_0: What a sweet gift, thank you @i.
dialog.npc.shepherd.gift_loved.4.line_0: This makes me feel very welcome here.
dialog.npc.shepherd.gift_loved.5.line_0: How'd you know I love these?
dialog.npc.shepherd.gift_liked.0.line_0: Thank you, I really appreciate it.
dialog.npc.shepherd.gift_liked.1.line_0: I know the perfect spot for this!
dialog.npc.shepherd.gift_liked.2.line_0: I was looking for this at the market the other day! How'd you know?
dialog.npc.shepherd.gift_liked.4.line_0: Is this from your farm? This is lovely.
dialog.npc.shepherd.gift_liked.5.line_0: This is a very considerate gift.
dialog.npc.shepherd.gift_liked.8.line_0: It's so nice to have people like you here.
dialog.npc.shepherd.gift_neutral.2.line_: I think one of my friends would like this!
dialog.npc.shepherd.gift_neutral.4.line_: Is this from your farm? I've never seen one quite like this.
dialog.npc.shepherd.gift_disliked.0.line: Oh! I wasn't expecting something like this.
dialog.npc.shepherd.gift_disliked.1.line: You must know animals way better than people...
dialog.npc.shepherd.gift_disliked.2.line: Sometimes it's better to not give gifts.
dialog.npc.shepherd.gift_disliked.6.line: Did you mean to give this to someone else?
dialog.npc.shepherd.gift_disliked.7.line: We don't really have to give gifts to eachother...
dialog.npc.shepherd.gift_hated.3.line_0: You can just ask me to leave directly.
dialog.npc.shepherd.gift_hated.5.line_0: This doesn't make me feel good...
dialog.npc.shepherd.gift_hated.6.line_0: I'm not sure I want this...
dialog.npc.shepherd.gift_hated.7.line_0: Can you leave me alone please.
dialog.npc.shepherd.gift_hated.8.line_0: I don't like these kinds of jokes.
dialog.npc.shepherd.gift_hated.9.line_0: Sorry but I really don't want this...
dialog.npc.shepherd.gift_hated.10.line_0: This might be the worst thing I've ever been given...
dialog.npc.shepherd.unique_five_gift.lin: Oh hello @i, I actually have a small favor for you!
Ace found these penguins out on an expedition to a frozen wasteland and told me to take care of them.
I don't mean to just shift the responsibility to you, but I really trust you to treat them with the care they deserve.
Unfortunately I don't have the means to build up a proper ice habitat, they wouldn't be happy with me.
If you're struggling with their mood, just pick up a mood scanner at my shop! It should be pretty cheap for you.
